name: Concrete Mixers
description: Site concrete mixers for construction and civil engineering projects. Diesel and electric drum mixers for small to medium concrete batch production.

machines.name: Altrad Belle Premier 100XT Site Concrete Mixer
machines.shortDescription: Altrad Belle Premier 100XT diesel site concrete mixer with 260 L drum capacity. Tip-up discharge design for small-to-medium concrete batching on construction sites.
machines.description: Altrad Belle Premier 100XT diesel site concrete mixer with 260 L drum capacity. Tip-up discharge design for small-to-medium concrete batching on construction sites. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Hatz air-cooled diesel starts in 50°C heat with no radiator or coolant to maintain
260 L drum batching 170 L of mixed concrete per cycle — 1 m³ per hour with a 2-man crew
Manual tip-up handwheel discharge with mechanical advantage — one operator tilts and pours
Pneumatic tyres with tow bar for on-site relocation behind a pickup or dumper truck
Altrad Belle cast iron ring gear with grease nipple — designed for 20+ year drum service life
3.2 L tank runs 8+ hours of intermittent batching on a single diesel fill

machines.name: Winget 100T Diesel Mechanical Concrete Mixer
machines.shortDescription: Winget 100T diesel mechanical concrete mixer with 200 L drum. Reversing drum design for thorough mixing with mechanical dump discharge — a classic UK construction site machine.
machines.description: Winget 100T diesel mechanical concrete mixer with 200 L drum. Reversing drum design for thorough mixing with mechanical dump discharge — a classic UK construction site machine. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Reversing drum design mixes 20% faster than tilt-drum equivalents for the same batch size
V-belt and friction clutch drive — field-serviceable with standard tools, no hydraulics
Hatz 1B20 diesel sips 0.4 L/hr under batch mixing conditions for all-day fuel economy
Mechanical dump discharge with counterweight assist — no electrical or hydraulic failure points
Standard road tow hitch for highway towing at 80 km/h between sites
Winget UK manufacturing with cast components — parts available through Dubai equipment dealers

machines.name: Safari 10/7 Heavy Duty Hydraulic Concrete Mixer
machines.shortDescription: Safari 10/7 heavy-duty hydraulic concrete mixer with 280 L drum. Hydraulic tilt discharge for precision pouring into formwork — built for Indian and Middle Eastern construction.
machines.description: Safari 10/7 heavy-duty hydraulic concrete mixer with 280 L drum. Hydraulic tilt discharge for precision pouring into formwork — built for Indian and Middle Eastern construction. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Discharge: Hydraulic ram tilt with hand lever control

features: Hydraulic ram tilt discharge with hand lever — pour directly into column and beam formwork
280 L drum with 200 L output per batch — one mixer serves a small villa slab pour
Lister Petter twin-cylinder diesel with cast iron block for continuous-duty Indian/Middle East use
4-wheel rigid chassis with tow bar — stable during towing and mixing on uneven ground
Hydraulic system with relief valve prevents ram damage if the drum hits an obstruction during tilt
Cast manganese steel mixing blades bolt-on replaceable — no welding needed for blade changes

machines.name: Kushlan Products 600DD Direct Drive Concrete Mixer
machines.shortDescription: Kushlan 600DD electric direct-drive concrete mixer with 170 L drum. 230V single-phase portable mixer for small batch concrete, mortar, and plaster mixing on finishing crews.
machines.description: Kushlan 600DD electric direct-drive concrete mixer with 170 L drum. 230V single-phase portable mixer for small batch concrete, mortar, and plaster mixing on finishing crews. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 230V single-phase electric motor — plug into any site outlet, zero fuel, zero fumes for indoor use
Direct-drive gear motor eliminates belt tensioning and slippage — zero drivetrain maintenance
65 kg with wheelbarrow-style handles — two workers hand-carry up stairs for high-rise finishing
28 RPM drum speed is 20% faster than diesel equivalents — faster batch cycles for plaster and mortar
Locking quadrant holds the drum at any pour angle for controlled discharge into buckets and wheelbarrows
0.75 kW motor costs under 2 AED per day in electricity — the cheapest operating mixer in the fleet
